version.author: Blue Kachina
version.changelog: 1.0.1: Fix ReaPack indexing (package was silently excluded after a provides/file-ownership conflict with a bundled library's demo file; force reindex now that the conflict is resolved). 1.0.0: Initial ReaPack release.

version.author: Blue Kachina
version.changelog: 1.0.2: Add tags (looper, loop, sampler, multitrack) for ReaPack categorization. 1.0.1: Fix ReaPack indexing (package was silently excluded after a provides/file-ownership conflict with a bundled library's demo file; force reindex now that the conflict is resolved). 1.0.0: Initial ReaPack release.

reapack.name: MidiNoteFilterByDrumType.jsfx
reapack.desc: MIDI Note Filter By Drum Type

version.author: Blue Kachina
version.changelog: 1.0.2: Fixed a false-attractor bug where a genuine 3-beat rhythm could get stuck permanently misdetected as 2 -- every real 3-beat onset landed exactly on one of the tolerated "triplet variation" ratios relative to the wrong 2-grid, so it never accumulated enough evidence to self-correct. Auto-detection can no longer land on 2 sides at all (a 2-gon is a degenerate line, not a shape), which closes the trap at its root; minimum detected/settable side count is now 3. 1.0.1: Fixed shapes snapping back to full opacity in a scrambled rainbow of every auto-added hue when the playhead moved backward (loop restart or manual rewind/seek) -- a stale "last hit" timestamp from later in the timeline was being misread as a hit in the near future, un-fading every enabled rhythm at once regardless of whether it was actually still sounding. 1.0.0: Initial ReaPack release.
